name: cep_exists_order_satisfying_ins
drl: rule R when exists E1() P() then end
_finding: D-147 exists regime 2 (was the D-144 in_cycle fence): a P inserted in the SATISFYING epoch splits by position vs the transition witness. P2 (BEFORE the E1) was inserted while unsatisfied -> joins the re-fire batch as its newest epoch, firing FIRST; P3 (AFTER the E1) arrived while SATISFIED -> a fresh stream insert firing AFTER the batch: cycle1 [1], re-fire+fresh [2,1,3]. Engine pre-D-147 FIFO'd the whole cycle ([1,2,3]). ins_seg >= RuleNet.satisfy_seg detects the fresh class. Fixes cf407x121's NE6.
